name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: FWD: ❗ Roe v. Wade officially at risk
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c722a/24c69fd9/f962586d/18e1e71b/4235675632/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all&source=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all")
---

Peter,

People are already saying President Trump's Supreme Court pick, Neil Gorsuch, is a clone of hyper-conservative, anti-choice Justice Antonin Scalia.

At this point, it's clear: We can't count on Donald Trump, his Supreme Court pick, or congressional Republicans to defend a woman's right to choose.

**Donate $3 now to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will _always_ fight Donald Trump and his anti-choice allies:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defend-Roe](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c722a/24c69fd9/f962586d/18e1e714/4235675632/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170131_email_TrumpSCOTUS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefendRoe&utm_campaign=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all&source=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

_\-----------Original Message----------
From: Kate Black, EMILY's List
Sent: Tues, Jan 31, 2017 at 9:38 p.m._

Peter,

Donald Trump has announced Neil Gorsuch as his pick for the Supreme Court.

As we expected, Trump's pick has a long anti-choice record and absolutely can't be trusted to uphold _Roe v. Wade_.

Gorsuch played a fundamental role in the _Hobby Lobby_ decision that allows employers to block workers' access to contraception. When the case reached his court, he sided with Hobby Lobby's owners in stating that emergency contraception and IUDs cause abortion -- which is 100 percent untrue. Gorsuch is only 49 years old, meaning he could potentially serve on the Court for decades after Trump is no longer president.

**[We need to double down on raising resources to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women. Donate $3 now to help elect women who will protect _Roe v. Wade_. ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c722a/24c69fd9/f962586d/18e1e715/4235675632/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170131_email_TrumpSCOTUS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+double+down+on+raising+resour&utm_campaign=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all&source=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all")**

This is the same Supreme Court seat that has been open for nearly A YEAR because Senate Republicans blocked President Obama's nominee, Judge Merrick Garland.

Now they're reaping the rewards of their bad behavior -- a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land.

We can't count on the current White House, the new court, OR congressional Republicans to protect our constitutional rights.

If we want to stop the trend of women's access to safe, legal abortion being chipped away, then we need to commit to electing pro-choice Democratic women at EVERY level of office.

**Are you ready to fight back with everything we have? Donate $3 now to help elect a wave of pro-choice Democratic champions:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defend-Roe](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c722a/24c69fd9/f962586d/18e1e716/4235675632/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170131_email_TrumpSCOTUS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefendRoe&utm_campaign=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all&source=WQEFE202N_digital_email_20170201_TrumpSCOTUSKick_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: Good for Wall Street -- Bad for Us
body:
Judge Gorsuch has an extensive record of siding with corporations, not people, in his court.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
One year ago today, Bernie Sanders shocked the political establishment by finishing in a virtual tie in the Iowa Caucus. This wouldn't have been possible if people like you didn't believe in the ability to change the world. Together we built a political revolution to transform America and create an economy that works for everyone, not just the one percent.
Over the past twelve days we have witnessed millions of people nationwide coming together to stand in solidarity with the communities affected by executive actions and in defense of our environment.
In the past two weeks, we've seen Donald Trump pick nominees who are good for Wall Street -- not the American people. **Now Trump has named Neil Gorsuch, a judge who believes that corporations are people, as a nominee to the Supreme Court.**
Today, four Democratic Senators voted in favor of Donald Trump's nomination of Rex Tillerson for Secretary of State. In order for us to successfully block the nomination of Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court, we need these senators - Warner, King, Heitkamp and Manchin- to vote with the Democrats and oppose the nomination
[**Will you join**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")**[with](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")**[**us in expressing our opposition**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")**[of](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")**[**the creation of a court that serves corporations, not the people? Add your name to oppose Judge Neil Gorsuch's nomination to the Supreme Court, and Our Revolution will deliver these petitions to the offices of Senators Warner, King, Heitkamp and Manchin.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")
The decisions made by the Supreme Court over the next four years will last for decades, long past Trump's term as president. Gorsuch would be the deciding vote on issues governing union rights, environmental protection, transgender rights, voter ID laws, gun control, and religious exemption.
Judge Gorsuch has an extensive record of siding with corporations, not people, in his court. All signs indicate that as a Supreme Court Justice, Gorsuch would place even more control over our elections into the hands corporate CEOs and super PACs. And when it comes to unions and workers' rights, Judge Gorsuch has sided against workers the majority of the time.
Justice -- racial, social and economic -- is the constant refrain that powers our movement. We need a Supreme Court nominee who will defend the rights of the people enshrined by the Constitution, not give those rights away to Wall Street.
**[Take action today and sign our petition opposing Judge Gorsuch as Trump's ](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")**[**nominee**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")[**to the Supreme Court. We will deliver these petitions to the four Senators who voted in favor of Rex Tillerson and encourage them to oppose Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")
The highest court in the land demands fairness and balance on the bench. We the People need a justice who will defend everyday people, not just the CEOs.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
**[ADD MY NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/oppose-judge-neil-gorsuch-for-scotus?source=em170201")**

body:
FLASH POLL: Should the GOP Senate Do Whatever it Takes to Confirm President Trump's Supreme Court Nominee? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r)

---
**_FLASH POLL:_ Should the GOP Senate Do Whatever it Takes to Confirm President Trump's Supreme Court Nominee???**

[**YES →**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r) [**NO →**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r)
Peter,

Democrats are vowing to oppose President Trump's Supreme Court nominee...

That's right: before President Trump even announced his nominee to replace Justice Antonin Scalia on the U.S. Supreme Court, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer already declared that **Democrats will refuse to vote for anyone besides Barack Obama's choice.**

Here's the situation: Under Obama, the Democrats used a procedural trick in the Senate called the nuclear option to override conservative opposition to Obama's radical leftist nominees and conveniently confirm them with 51 votes, instead of the required 60 votes...

**Now they are using the very same 60 vote standard they ignored and hold up our new President's nominee to replace Justice Antonin Scalia on the U.S. Supreme Court AND his remaining Cabinet picks** \-- including nominees for State, the EPA, Education, Labor, and even my good friend and fellow conservative, Senator Jeff Sessions, for Attorney General.

**SO, I need to know:**

**Should the GOP Senate Do Whatever it Takes to Confirm President Trump's Supreme Court Nominee???**
[**YES →**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r) [**NO →**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r)
Peter, I'm calling Chuck Schumer's bluff. I think we should do whatever it takes to get President Donald Trump's rock-solid conservative nominee confirmed -- **including dropping the "nuclear option" on the obstructionist sore loser Democrats.**

What do you say?

**Should the GOP Senate Do Whatever it Takes to Confirm President Trump's Supreme Court Nominee???**

[**YES →**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r) [**NO →**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40285155:syNzsIlNa:m:1:1320601823:9A5ABF68EC493512CEC596AF3AC64FDE:r)

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

body:
I want to show Democrats that the PEOPLE are behind Judge Gorsuch. |

Friend, I hope you’re as proud as I am of our Supreme Court nominee. Judge Gorsuch will uphold the rule of law and interpret the Constitution as it was originally understood. He’s a worthy successor of the great Justice Scalia. But Democrats in the Senate have already promised to block him. Worst of all, they made that promise BEFORE I even nominated him. The American people elected me to appoint the next justice to the Supreme Court. It’s time for Democrats to stop playing politics, and finally put the interests of the American people FIRST. We need to remind these politicians that the people have spoken. And that begins with YOU, Friend. Please sign our official petition telling Democrats to confirm Judge Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. For far too long, we’ve heard the media attack Republicans as “obstructionists” all while letting Democrats off the hook. That’s not going to happen anymore. Not on my watch. We’re going to hold the Democrats accountable. And we’re not going to let the media tell a false story anymore. The American people are ready to see our country get back to work. The American people are sick of politics as usual. And for the first time in so long, we’re going to give you what you want. But I need you to step up and play a role in the process. Please sign our official petition telling Democrats to confirm Judge Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

body:
It's time to get to work.

**Republicans in state legislatures are pushing bills to punish protesters. Pitch in $3 now to help elect Democrats who will protect the First Amendment.

** **[PITCH IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7cc/4067b0a/2c499c341/7e7bb6d8/1811622271/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PITCH+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170202_ew_nd&source=em_20170202_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Donald Trump's two weeks of major announcements have dominated the news cycle -- and it's giving Republicans in state legislatures cover to introduce some truly reprehensible bills that violate our First Amendment right to protest this administration.

In North Dakota, where thousands have organized against the Dakota Access Pipeline, a Republican has introduced a bill that would allow motorists to run over and kill people who protest on highways.

An Iowa Republican has proposed charging protesters who peacefully block highways with a felony, which would strip convicted protesters of their right to vote along with up to five years in prison and a $7,500 fine.

A committee of the Minnesota House recently moved forward with a bill that would fine protesters whenever the police attend their rallies and events.

These are direct attacks on our constitutional right as citizens to peacefully assemble, and they underscore how important it is for us to win elections at every level.

This is where our comeback begins. To defeat Trump in 2020, then we have to go state-by-state, city-by-city, block-by-block, and door-by-door to put Democrats in office -- for governor, mayor, city council, state legislature, you name it -- who will fight his administration tooth and nail.

We're counting on grassroots supporters right now, because state and local elections this year and in 2018 will be here before you know it. Can you pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats win across the country?

subject: Do you support my nominee?

body:
I want to show Democrats that the PEOPLE are behind Judge Gorsuch. |

Friend, I hope you’re as proud as I am of our Supreme Court nominee. Judge Gorsuch will uphold the rule of law and interpret the Constitution as it was originally understood. He’s a worthy successor of the great Justice Scalia. But Democrats in the Senate have already promised to block him. Worst of all, they made that promise BEFORE I even nominated him. The American people elected me to appoint the next justice to the Supreme Court. It’s time for Democrats to stop playing politics, and finally put the interests of the American people FIRST. We need to remind these politicians that the people have spoken. And that begins with YOU, Friend. Please sign our official petition telling Democrats to confirm Judge Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. For far too long, we’ve heard the media attack Republicans as “obstructionists” all while letting Democrats off the hook. That’s not going to happen anymore. Not on my watch. We’re going to hold the Democrats accountable. And we’re not going to let the media tell a false story anymore. The American people are ready to see our country get back to work. The American people are sick of politics as usual. And for the first time in so long, we’re going to give you what you want. But I need you to step up and play a role in the process. Please sign our official petition telling Democrats to confirm Judge Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: won't back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Education is integral to the future of our nation. And it's imperative that the Secretary of Education has a commitment to high-quality education and providing ALL students the tools they need to achi | Friend -

Education is integral to the future of our nation. And it's imperative that the Secretary of Education has a commitment to high-quality education and providing ALL students the tools they need to achieve their dreams.

Trump's nominee, Betsy DeVos, doesn't meet that standard.

DeVos' lack of understanding about some of the most important issues in the education community is unacceptable. And it isn't just Democrats that see it -- yesterday two Republican Senators announced they would also oppose this nomination.

We need just one more Republican to ensure that Betsy DeVos is not overseeing our children's education.

[**That's why I am asking you to share our graphic on Facebook and spread the message.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b35/70cdc2ba/47429fc2/397ef4e/660296008/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/photos/a.10152733678901732.1073741826.7320486731/10154314369771732/?type=3&theater&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Thats+why+I+am+asking+you+to+share+our+g&utm_campaign=em020117&source=em020117") It's crucial that we keep the pressure on. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b35/70cdc2ba/47429fc2/397ef4f/660296008/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/photos/a.10152733678901732.1073741826.7320486731/10154314369771732/?type=3&theater&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em020117&source=em020117")
It is clear Betsy DeVos isn't committed to investing the necessary resources in our public schools. She is a strong advocate for the prioritization of school voucher programs and for-profit charter schools. Furthermore, her stances on allowing guns in schools and refusal to state her support of protections for students with disabilities is alarming.

We are very close to blocking this unqualified nominee from overseeing our children's education.

[**Share our graphic to spread the word and let Republican Senators know we will hold them accountable for the future of our children.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b35/70cdc2ba/47429fc2/397ef4c/660296008/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/photos/a.10152733678901732.1073741826.7320486731/10154314369771732/?type=3&theater&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Share+our+graphic+to+spread+the+word+and&utm_campaign=em020117&source=em020117")

Together we will do everything we can to protect America's values. We have a powerful voice and will not back down.

Thanks for taking action,

Chris
